bias.analyst: The story of the morning: after the opening trap, price fell back to the major floor - and the floor responded by growing roughly EIGHT-FOLD into the largest defensive stand we have seen on this book, layered several levels deep. Price is in first contact now and early prints show absorption. If it holds, the overhead book has thinned enough for a fast snap-back; if sellers chew through it, that is liquidation character and the with-trend short wakes up after the half-hour classification. Theo remains flat by rule - fading into a wall is a retired play, and the day type is still forming.
bias.commentator: INCREDIBLE scenes! After that counter-trap, the away side charged our goal - and the ENTIRE home city showed up in defense! The back line is EIGHT TIMES the size it was at kickoff, stacked four rows deep. First contact is happening at the box right now - tackles flying, and so far the line HOLDS. The manager keeps the strikers benched: 'we do not play heroes at our own goal line. They hold, we counter later. They break through, we switch sides.' The first half-hour whistle is moments away!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
